error_signature: node has a flaw to ollama
title: Issue with Ollama node in RAG AI agent
symptom: The RAG AI agent does not return useful matches or content when querying the VectorStore using the Ollama node.
applies_when: Using RAG AI agent with Ollama node
not_this_if: Using OpenAI node instead of Ollama
No issues with other file types
root_cause: The Ollama node in the RAG AI agent may have compatibility issues or bugs that prevent it from processing queries correctly, leading to no useful results being returned from the VectorStore.
fix_steps: Change the node in the RAG AI agent from Ollama to OpenAI
Set the API key to any value
Configure the Base URL to point to the local Ollama instance
Test the flow again to verify results
agent_instruction: Switch the RAG AI agent node from Ollama to OpenAI and configure it accordingly.
